_comment: Manually curated cross-source edges. These capture relationships that span source documents and that the per-source extractor cannot see. Endpoints are fully namespaced node ids (namespace::local_id). Edges whose endpoints are not present in the federated graph (e.g. sources not yet ingested) are skipped at merge time and reported, not dropped silently.

edges.note: Foreign founders must register with MISA before accessing SME support.
Once incorporated via MISA, founders can access Monshaat programmes.
MISA registration is the precondition for bank financing routes like Kafalah.
Dangling on purpose until the SVC source is ingested; demonstrates skip-and-report.
